title: Active Integration Blocker Register

blockers_before_active_queue_integration.blocker: No active generated article batch has been approved for queue insertion.
blockers_before_active_queue_integration.required_resolution: Approve a future controlled generation or candidate set before active queue integration.

blockers_before_active_queue_integration.blocker: No active queue mutation stage has been approved.
blockers_before_active_queue_integration.required_resolution: Create and audit a controlled apply stage before writing queue records.

blockers_before_active_queue_integration.blocker: No Admin action execution is enabled.
blockers_before_active_queue_integration.required_resolution: Keep queue entries non-public until a later secure Admin execution stage is approved.

blockers_before_active_queue_integration.blocker: No public visibility switch is approved.
blockers_before_active_queue_integration.required_resolution: Public visibility must remain false until a later publish-control stage.
Publish execution requires separate explicit approval.

allowed_next_without_resolving_blockers: Create validation fixtures that do not mutate active queue.
not_allowed_next_without_resolving_block: Write active Admin Review Queue records.
